emails.subject: May curtailment spread
emails.body: May curtailment spread Jeff, The files are in DesertSkyCurtail in your transfer dirtectory. Check the sums of the KWH.LOST columns with the values you were provided. These all seem to have been created the same day. Mark

emails.subject: Re: May curtailment spread
emails.body: Re: May curtailment spread Mark, I checked the sums with what was sent on 6/25 using the 10.4% correction. They are not the same. I will inform AEP that we will reprocess these figures. Maybe we can reprocess overnight on my and your machine next week rather than wait until the June result. JD
